name: Rocketeer
description: The Rocketeer is a Vladof launcher that spits compact rockets at a rapid rate, dealing splash damage that can be explosive or elemental. Its key advantage over similar Torpedo-class weapons is ammo efficiency, using just 2 rounds per rocket instead of the 3 to 4 rounds typical of comparable launchers.
notes: Available only at green rarity or higher. If it spawns without an accessory or elemental capacitor, it uses the standard grip prefix rather than a unique one. Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
